confirmation: General-feedback log entry recorded. Invoke logFeedback() with the payload below to persist to Supabase.

record.title: Appreciation: New Tab page
record.summary: User expressed gratitude; no issue described.

notes: Use logFeedback() from @/api/feedback or @/lib/feedback-logger with the persisted_fields to create the record in Supabase. The feedback_logs table stores source_url, page_title, message, sentiment, category, and created_at. Title and summary are documented here for reference.
